name: Old Fashioned Chocolate Butter Rolls
recipeInstructions:
For one butter roll:
1. Mix all ingredients.
2. Spread the mixture on the pie crust.
3. Roll up like a jelly roll and place in a greased pan to prevent sticking.
4. Dab margarine on top and pour milk until it is about 1/4 inch deep in the pan.
5. Cook until the crust is brown and crispy and the milk is absorbed. This takes about one hour at 275-300 degrees.
(Note: This recipe was taught to a friend of mine by her great grandfather.)
